name: Ponca City Country Club
description: Ponca City Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ponca City, OK. There are 8 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, food, water, and lights.

name: RecPlex Recreation Center
description: RecPlex Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Ponca City, OK. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
